sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40140" key="e)pimeidi/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμειδ-ίᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40140.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">smiling upon</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1009e</biblScope> </bibl>: pl., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-σεις τῆς ψυχῆς</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1092d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
